{{Quote|It seems that the Rebels have infiltrated our energy production operation on Sarapin. They've been tapping into the energy collectors.|[[Malcor Brashin]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
The planet [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] was home to many '''energy collectors''' grouped into '''energy collection farms'''. The energy collectors tapped the geothermal energy of Sarapin's many lava flows. The energy was then stored and shipped to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet was estimated to provide 80 percent of the energy consumption for the Core.

==History==
[[File:Decimator_on_Sarapin.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A captured [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimator]] [[Assault on Sarapin|attacks]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] energy collectors on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]].]]

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Sarapin's energy collectors were [[Assault on Sarapin|captured]] by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], creating a crisis in the Core. [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] was able to [[Recapture of Sarapin|take back]] the planet, however.

The next major threat came in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], when it was discovered that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had covertly seized several collectors and was siphoning their output. [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] and his subordinate [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Brenn Tantor]] arrived after discovering evidence of the Rebels' activities on [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] and swiftly [[Battle of Sarapin (Galactic Civil War)|took back]] the collectors. Even the Rebels' attempts to lock out the Imperials by changing the access codes failed in the face of [[Dellis Tantor]]'s [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]].
